board_csa_architect.notes: Clean provider abstraction with failover. email_logs table with RLS. Per-tier caps from TENANT_LIFECYCLE. No schema conflicts.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: RLS on email_logs enforces tenant isolation. API keys in env vars only. PII in recipient field redacted via censor for Org 0 views. Rate limiting prevents abuse.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No VRAM impact — pure API integration. React Email templates align with Next.js stack. TypeScript-first SDK (Resend).

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Resend+SendGrid DR ensures 3AM resilience. Redis counters for rate limiting survive restarts. Queued overflow prevents data loss.
